feed.title: massivebugs
feed.subtitle: Write an awesome description for your new site here. You can edit this line in _config.yml. It will appear in your document head meta (for Google search results) and in your feed.xml site description.

entry.title: Cybersecurity Learning Plan
entry.content: After reading and listening to several tips on how to get started in cybersecurity, this is the plan I came up with. (It is subject to changes)
entry.summary: After reading and listening to several tips on how to get started in cybersecurity, this is the plan I came up with. (It is subject to changes)
